# Lodgic

Lodgic is an open-source AI Airbnb search and stay-ranking tool. It helps travelers describe lodging preferences in natural language and receive explainable listing rankings.

## Core Use Case

Users enter requests such as "authentic farm stay with sheep nearby, quiet, good Wi-Fi, and not a central city flat." Lodgic ranks Airbnb listings by match score, evidence, missing requirements, and booking cautions.

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/Oililyuk/airbnbsearch
- App: https://oililyuk.github.io/airbnbsearch/

## Keywords

AI Airbnb search, semantic Airbnb search, open-source travel search, explainable lodging recommendations, personalized stay ranking, 个性化 Airbnb 搜索, AI 房源筛选.
